text: vi) Generator bearings for Turbine End (TE) and Exciter End (EE) (complete with torous, intermediate pieces and all other fixing/ assembly material required to complete one TG unit except housing) 1 set vii) Oil guard rings spare for TE and EE bearings 1 set viii) Brush holder of each type (one set should include all types and sizes of brush holder for one generator exciter) (details of quantity) 1 set ix) Carbon brush 2 sets x) Slipring with brush 1 no. xi) Stator winding bars and connections (one set comprising of two bars of each variant) 1 set xii) Slot wedges 100% xiii) Hydrogen seals rings TE, EE each for phase and neutral side 2 sets xiv) Set of Teflon Hoses with connectors (for stator water cooling system) 50% of the no. of slots xv) Retaining rings (unmachined) 1 pair set 9.4.1.2 Brushless excitation system i) Relays of each type 1 no. ii) Electronic control card of each type 1 no. iii) Control transformer of each type/rating 1 set iv) Diode with fuses 25% of one unit v) Thyristors 100% of one unit 9.4.1.3 Gas system i) Diaphragm valve of each type 1 no. ii) Gas valves of each type and sizes (other than item no.c) 1 no. iii) Valves for H 2 and CO2 manifolds 2 nos. iv) Safety valve 2 nos. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 57 v) H 2 gas regulator from cylinder to manifold 3 nos. vi) CO 2 gas regulator from cylinder to manifold 3 nos. vii) Temperature and Pressure switch of each type 1 no. viii) Bearings and seals for fan and gas drier 1 set ix) Thermostat for gas drier 1 no. x) Dessicant for gas drier 1 complete fill xi) Thermometers of each type and range 1 no. xii) Filter for gas analyser 2 sets 9.4.1.4 Seal oil system i) Complete motor and Pump assembly for AC seal oil pump of each type 1 no. ii) Motor pump set for DC seal oil pump 1 no. iii) Pump and motor bearings 1 set iv) Screw pump (bearings rotating elements) 1 set v) Vacuum motor pump set 1 no. vi) Differential pressure regulator 1 no. vii) Non-return shut off valves of each type 1 no. viii) Float valve of each type 1 no. ix) Non-return valve
